description_long: This object consists of three segments of a wooden fence, each with a weathered, grayish-brown appearance. The fence panels are rectangular, featuring two horizontal rails and several vertical planks, all showing signs of aging and exposure to the elements. The wood grain and texture are visible, giving the fence a rustic, utilitarian look suitable for urban or suburban environments. The tops of the panels are flat, and there are no decorative elements or post caps present. The panels are grouped side by side, likely representing different levels of detail for rendering purposes. The overall construction appears sturdy, with the panels designed to act as a visual and physical barrier.
description: A set of three weathered wooden fence panels with flat tops and visible wood grain, arranged side by side. The panels are simple, sturdy, and utilitarian, with no decorative features.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thin profile of the three fence panels, with little detail visible except their alignment.
description_view_1: Front view displaying all three fence panels side by side, highlighting the wood texture, horizontal rails, and vertical planks.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the thin profile of the panels with minimal visible detail.
description_view_3: Rear or alternate front view of the three fence panels, similar to view 1 but without the shadowed text labels.
